meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Build a Portfolio for Students
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' hurdle. Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to build production-ready projects and launch your career as an AI builder.
content.answer_block: To solve your lack of a portfolio, leverage Claude Code to accelerate development while using Antigravity to structure your architecture. By automating the boilerplate and focusing on high-level logic, you can ship three complex, real-world SaaS features in a single weekend, turning your GitHub profile into a magnet for recruiters.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the student's greatest enemy. You have the theoretical knowledge, yet the industry demands a portfolio that proves you can ship, not just study. The gap between your current skill level and a hireable reality isn't intelligence; it is execution velocity.

We are bridging that gap. By integrating Claude Code into your workflow, you transform from a student into an AI-augmented engineer. This isn't just about writing code; it's about mastering the orchestration of modern dev tools to build production-grade applications that stand out in a crowded market.

steps.title: Environment Bootstrapping
steps.description: Initialize your project structure to ensure scalability before writing a single line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a production-ready Next.js 14 project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI components. Include a clean folder structure for services and hooks.

steps.title: Database Schema Design
steps.description: Define your data models to handle complex relationships, which is a key requirement for senior-level portfolio projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application, including users, projects, and subscription tiers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npx prisma init && npx prisma migrate dev'

steps.title: API Layer Implementation
steps.description: Create robust, type-safe API endpoints that simulate real-world backend requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure API route for user authentication using NextAuth.js, ensuring CSRF protection and secure session management.

steps.title: Business Logic Injection
steps.description: Use Claude to write complex logic, then perform a manual code review to ensure you understand the implementation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a service function that calculates project usage metrics and updates the database using Zod for input validation.

steps.title: Deployment and Documentation
steps.description: Ship your project and document it so recruiters can immediately understand your technical prowess.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a professional README.md that highlights the technical challenges solved, the tech stack, and deployment instructions.

pro_tips: Always audit Claude Code output; treat it as a junior developer who needs a senior's review to reach production quality.
Focus on 'depth over breadth'—one complex project with edge-case handling is worth more than ten basic to-do apps.
Use Antigravity to generate unit tests for every service; recruiters look for test coverage as a sign of professional maturity.
Commit frequently with conventional commit messages to show a clear, professional development history in your GitHub contributions.
Optimize for 'Time to First Value' in your UI; ensure your portfolio app is live on Vercel or Railway for instant demonstration.
content.next_steps: After completing your first project, deploy it live, write a technical blog post explaining one complex bug you solved, and link it directly to your LinkedIn profile.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the workflow, and the roadmap to build a portfolio that commands attention. Stop waiting for permission to be an engineer and start shipping today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
